caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a small red bowtie and black headphones over his ears. He sits with his arms crossed, maintaining a serious expression and gazing slightly to his left. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and a clothing rack with apparel, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. A white piece of paper is clipped to a stand beside him. A logo appearing in the lower-left area of the scene features a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". The scene remains static across the frames, with the man remaining in the same seated position and expression.
